schedules_text:
Gate A at (4,5): open exactly when (t mod 6) is in {0, 4, 5}. So it is open at t=0,4,5,6,10,11,... and closed at t=1,2,3,7,8,9,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Gate B at (1,8): open exactly when (t mod 2) is in {1}. So it is open at t=1,3,... and closed at t=0,2,... You can only step ONTO it at a tick t+1 where it is open.
Guard P: walks a fixed cycle of length 4. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 4) as follows: t mod 4=0: (9,5); t mod 4=1: (9,6); t mod 4=2: (8,6); t mod 4=3: (9,6). This repeats forever.
Guard Q: walks a fixed cycle of length 6. Its position at tick t is determined by (t mod 6) as follows: t mod 6=0: (1,2); t mod 6=1: (1,3); t mod 6=2: (2,3); t mod 6=3: (2,2); t mod 6=4: (2,3); t mod 6=5: (1,3). This repeats forever.
parcels_text:
Parcel 1: pick it up at (3,4) (map glyph '1'), deliver it to (2,4) (map glyph 'x'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
Parcel 2: pick it up at (2,7) (map glyph '2'), deliver it to (3,2) (map glyph 'y'). Pickup and delivery happen automatically when you end a tick on the cell.
